mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, sku_id, type, product_name, sku_name, original_price, deal_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.type}, #{item.productName}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.originalPrice}, #{item.dealPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, sku_id, type, product_name, sku_name, original_price, deal_price, quantity, subtotal, create_time, update_time FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
